headlines.title: Elon Musk expected to testify in OpenAI trial
headlines.description: Elon Musk is set to testify in court as soon as Tuesday in his legal showdown against OpenAI's Sam Altman.

headlines.title: Republicans in Florida again block Ron DeSantis' push to regulate AI
headlines.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis is emerging as a voice of AI skepticism in the Republican Party, but the state Legislature declined to take up his push for legislation.

headlines.title: Correspondents' dinner conspiracy theories spread so fast that even Trump was alarmed
headlines.description: A flood of misinformation, conspiracy theories and false claims about the shooting at Saturday night’s White House Correspondents' Association dinner spread online at a notable and concerningly speedy rate, mostly about the baseless theory that the incident had been staged.

headlines.title: Tech stocks slide following report on OpenAI missing key targets
headlines.description: Tech stocks slid Tuesday after The Wall Street Journal published a report warning that ChatGPT-maker OpenAI was falling short of revenue and user targets, fueling concerns about whether the tech industry’s multitrillion-dollar investment in AI will eventually pay off

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Taylor Swift files to trademark her voice and likeness in era of AI deepfakes
headlines.description: Taylor Swift is taking new steps to protect her voice and likeness from AI misuse.

headlines.title: What's at stake in the Elon Musk-Sam Altman trial
headlines.description: Jury selection begins Monday in a federal courtroom in Oakland, California, in a civil trial featuring one tech billionaire, Elon Musk, who is suing another, Sam Altman.

headlines.title: James Comey indicted over seashell photo that officials said threatened Trump
headlines.description: A federal grand jury has returned an indictment charging former FBI Director James Comey over an Instagram photo he posted of seashells, which allies of President Donald Trump portrayed as a threat, two sources familiar with the matter tell NBC News

headlines.title: UAE announces it will leave OPEC
headlines.description: The United Arab Emirates said it would leave the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries after being a part of the group that coordinates oil output among the world’s top producers for over five decades. NBC News’ Christine Romans reports on the motivations behind the UAE’s withdrawal.

headlines.title: Jury selection begins in Elon Musk's trial against OpenAI's Sam Altman
headlines.description: Jury selection began in Elon Musk’s civil trial against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman. NBC News’ Brian Cheung explains how both sides will try to make their case and how the jury selection is unfolding.

headlines.title: Get an Inside Look at the 'Air Taxi' Set to Revolutionize Travel
headlines.description: An electric-powered Air Taxi, created by California-based Joby, is a cross between a plane and a helicopter and it could revolutionize how we get around, turning a potentially hourslong trip into a short 10-minute ride — all for the price of an Uber. Reporting for TODAY, NBC’s Sam Brock shares a first-hand look at the future of travel and how soon they're expected to launch.

headlines.title: Sony AI's table-tennis-playing robot makes history by beating elite human players
headlines.description: Ace, a ping-pong-playing robot, is the first to beat elite human players in a competitive sport, according to Sony AI. It's a big milestone for robotics that could extend beyond sports. NBC News' Emilie Ikeda reports.
